# Techaneh | تکانه

> Bilingual technology media with source-backed news, practical education, product comparisons, and buying guides.

- Home: https://techaneh.ir/
- RSS: https://techaneh.ir/feed.xml
- JSON Feed: https://techaneh.ir/feed.json
- Sitemap: https://techaneh.ir/sitemap.xml
- Contact: mailto:shahryarvn@gmail.com

Articles are available as indexable Persian and English HTML pages under /fa/articles/ and /en/articles/.
